event: Bust Portrait of Madame de Pompadour
description: A white marble bust sculpture of a young woman displayed against a neutral grey background. She has delicately carved curling hair adorned with small carved flowers. Her face shows a slight smile with refined features. The bust shows bare shoulders and decolletage, with elaborately carved drapery and lace across the chest. The sculpture rests on a rounded marble socle or pedestal. The carving demonstrates remarkable detail in the lace texture and the soft modulation of the marble surface.
